headline: Informing the Modern Recruiter through RecTech Media News, Podcasts and Webinars. Job board operations expert. Recruitment Technology influencer, content creator, advisor, consultant.
current_position_description: Created a 20 site local job board network for Connecticut, New York and several other job markets between DC and Vermont. Worked closely with recruiters and HR managers to make their online recruiting efforts more effective through job postings, job fairs and other talent attraction techniques. I sold the company in 2012.
investor_title:
Chris Russell is the managing director of RecTech Media. "Chris oversees the development of our technology platform, strategy, and system architecture. He is also highly involved in our studio negotiations and helping us intersect technology with business development.

Prior to joining us in 2005, Chris held positions as a Vice President of Technology with Sony Pictures Entertainment and the Motion Picture Association of America. At SPE, Chris was responsible for launching MovieLink, a broadband movie download service co-funded by Sony Pictures, Warner Bros., Universal Studios, Paramount and MGM. He developed technologies and patents for secure entertainment systems and led engineering at Sony Imageworks to develop visual effects software. At the MPAA, Chris led the association's participation in a range of digital rights management standards-setting initiatives. An entertainment veteran and movie buff, Chris has worked on dozens of productions, including visual effects for Stuart Little, Contact, Dolores Claiborne, Starship Troopers and Clear & Present Danger.

Chris is a Cal Poly Pomona Bronco with a B.S. in Computer Science. He went on to get an MBA from Pepperdine University (go Waves!)." (Source: [DivX](http://www.divx.com/organization/about/bio.php?bio=chrisrussell))

positionList.title: Founder
positionList.description: Created a 20 site local job board network for Connecticut, New York and several other job markets between DC and Vermont. Worked closely with recruiters and HR managers to make their online recruiting efforts more effective through job postings, job fairs and other talent attraction techniques. I sold the company in 2012.

positionList.title: Information Architect
positionList.description: As an IA I worked with companies such as GE, John Hancock and Diners Club where as part of a web design team I organized and refined the content and user experience for their websites.

positionList.title: Talent Acquisition Manager
positionList.description:
Working directly under the CEO and hiring managers I attract new talent for a small but rapidly growing e-commerce software company. Responsible for full life-cycle recruitment initiatives including sourcing, job board advertising, social recruiting, employment branding, interviewing and background checks.

* Responsible for multiple job requisitions ranging from Sales to Information Technology
* Develop recruiting strategies and online campaigns to attract talent proactively.
* Created the first ever company career site at goecart.jobs single-handedly.
* Established the company brand in local job market through job fairs, online advertising and other methods.
* Implemented SmartRecruiters applicant tracking system as the company’s first ever ATS.
* Sourced for candidates daily through social media and boolean techniques.

positionList.title: Job Board Consultant
positionList.description: As a job board consultant I assist job board owners and entrepreneurs with starting/launching/managing their job boards online.

positionList.title: Managing Director
positionList.description:
My job is to inform and empower the modern recruiter though my articles, podcasts and other media I produce on a weekly basis. Think of me as a digital recruiting coach. Follow me and you will learn. I help recruiting tech vendors with lead generation, brand awareness and getting click to their content and events.

RECRUITMENT TECHNOLOGY EXPERT
* Writer/reporter covering HR and Recruiting events.
* Empower recruiting technology vendors to build their brand awareness.
* Skilled at content marketing for employers/vendors and turning that content into leads (applications)
* Highly adept at job board and employer SEO tactics.
* Advisor to tech vendors and job board owners.
* Podcast Host of the Rec Tech Podcast
* Host of Rec Tech Live virtual events that inform and educate recruiters.

positionList.title: Director of Digital Recruiting
positionList.description:
As the head of Digital Recruiting I was responsible for all job advertising initiatives including recruitment marketing and HR technologies such as ATS, Social Media and Employer Branding. I rejuvenated an employer brand & revamped all recruitment strategy & marketing to attract hospitality talent to meet weekly corporate and shipboard hiring deadlines. 

* Working closely with the recruiting staff and senior management I implemented all recruitment marketing initiatives from job postings to job fairs to the career site.
* Developed the "Cruise to Work" employer value proposition as the main theme for all recruitment marketing.
* I managed all vendor relationships with companies like Indeed, Glassdoor and Taleo. Lessened reliance on Indeed (and lowered spend) by introducing new cheaper sources of applicants, particularly on the recent grad side.
* Successfully implemented a new career site (aclcareers.com) single-handedly and started our new careers focused social media channels on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and Linkedin - @aclcareers
* Revamped all job descriptions to become more VISUAL and sell the candidate on coming to work for ACL.
* Engaged candidates on daily basis through use of popular social media channels.
* In my final project I transitioned the company from the Taleo ATS to ICIMS over a 6 week period resulting in better conversion rates and enhanced candidate experience.
